text: Hello? Yes. Hello. Good afternoon. This is Alyssa. I'm glad because there are pending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through Mississippi State Relief Program. So, have you been notified about these benefits yet? Yes, I am. And they already told me, "I'm getting everything that I can get here in Mississippi." So, we actually work with the largest network of Medicare providers and I'd love to help you get your eligibility sorted out. You're on Part A and Part B, I take it? Yes, but actually, I'm telling you, I've already talked to someone and they say it's nothing else that I can get. So, since you already have a Medicare plan, these credits can easily be processed on your account. Please hold while I get that done for you. No. Ten years or two.
